title: fix: restore wan airforce primary with DashScope fallback
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Airforce One Returns
gist.blurb: Wan video generation is back on the Airforce provider, bringing costs down by 4x. We've also added a safety net so the show always goes on.
gist.summary: Restored api.airforce as the primary provider for Wan video generation with automatic DashScope fallback to ensure reliability while lowering costs.
gist.impact: Video generation is now 4x cheaper, with a backup system in place to keep generations flowing smoothly.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee piloting a cute pixel plane (Airforce) with the Robot acting as ground crew. Visualizing the 'landing' of prices and the 'backup' safety net.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the Bee piloting a small, cute pixel airplane through fluffy pastel clouds. The Robot stands on a cloud holding a '4x CHEAPER' sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) sun rays. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like A Short Hike. Nostalgic and airy.
